Package org.apache.juneau.http

Class HttpHeaders

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.http.HttpHeaders
public final class HttpHeaders extends Object
Static factory methods for creating common HTTP headers.

This is a convenience class that provides shorthand access to all named header types in org.apache.juneau.http.header.

// Import statically for clean DSL-style usage import static HttpHeaders.*; RestRequest req = client.get("/api/resource") .header(accept("application/json")) .header(authorization("Bearer " + token));

Beta — API subject to change: This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack (org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*). It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in the next major Juneau release (and possibly earlier).

See Also:
  • juneau-ng REST client
Since:
9.2.1

    • thrown

      public static Thrown thrown(String value)
      Parameters:
      value - The header value. @return A new header.

    • header

      public static HttpHeader header(String name, String value)
      Creates a generic HttpHeader with the given name and value.
      Parameters:
      name - The header name. Must not be null.
      value - The header value. May be null.
      Returns:
      A new header. Never null.

    • header

      public static HttpHeader header(String name, Supplier<String> valueSupplier)
      Creates a generic HttpHeader with a lazy value supplier.
      Parameters:
      name - The header name. Must not be null.
      valueSupplier - Supplier for the header value. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      A new header. Never null.
